{{Quote|Never turn your back on Caerbellak.|A saying among Caerbellak's staff|<ref name="Easy" />}}
'''Caerbellak''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] who governed [[Rydonni Prime]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. An adept politician and skilled military commander, Caerbellak saw himself as the man who could destroy the fledgling [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and restore the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]] after surviving the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Based on Rydonni Prime, he employed [[Rythani Products]] to develop a [[Rythani Products prototype|secret weapon]] that, he hoped, could destroy the New Republic. His primary bodyguard was [[Variise]].<ref name="Easy" />
